query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingredient_dilutions (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ingredientId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  percentage decimal(8,4) NOT NULL,
  solvent varchar(255) DEFAULT 'Ethanol',
  notes text,
  dateCreated timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4W3DGjM8p88cMXG.root --database XdWHm4xfoyiJjMtyZcmYpw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingredient_dilutions (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ingredientId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  percentage decimal(8,4) NOT NULL,
  solvent varchar(255) DEFAULT 'Ethanol',
  notes text,
  dateCreated timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
